paragraphs.text: I'm a frontend engineer who likes working close to hard problems —
audio pipelines inside browser extensions, streaming AI interfaces, SDKs other teams build on

At Eka.care I work on products doctors rely on every day, which keeps the bar for reliability and UX uncompromisingly high. I think the best frontend work in the AI era is about turning unpredictable, streaming model output into interfaces that feel instant, editable, and trustworthy.
— Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College (AKTU), Class of 2025 · CGPA 9.0/10.

facts.text: Top-5 finalist — PARADIGM E-Summit National Hackathon
